title: Using the live scoreboard
description: How to track live games, scores, and prediction performance on the WagerProof scoreboard.

content.text: The WagerProof scoreboard gives you real-time scores for games across all supported sports. It updates automatically so you can track the action without refreshing.

items: Real-time score updates for all active games.
Prediction overlays showing how the model's picks are performing.
Quick filtering by sport (NFL, CFB, NBA, NCAAB).
Live score ticker at the top of the app for at-a-glance updates.

content.text: The scrolling score ticker at the top of the app shows currently active games. Tap any game in the ticker to jump directly to the full scoreboard with detailed stats.
The scoreboard is available to both free and Pro users.
